items.title: Mascherano quits as Inter Miami head coach
items.summary: Javier Mascherano has quit as Inter Miami head coach, just four months after guiding the club to its first MLS Cup title.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
